info.title: tdx API
info.description:
The tdx productivity API: **tasks**, **events** (calendar), and **notes** (a file-backed vault), unified by a shared query language (`POST /api/query`) and cross-app categorizers (a project / calendar / folder matched by name). Every resource is scoped to the authenticated user.

**Authentication** — two interchangeable credentials, accepted on every non-public route:
- **Session cookie** (`tdx_session`): from `POST /api/auth/login`; browser flow, full scope.
- **Bearer token** (`Authorization: Bearer tdx_pat_…`): a scoped personal access token from `POST /api/auth/tokens`; for agents/integrations. A `read`-only token cannot write.

Writes additionally require **write** scope; admin routes require an **admin** account — OpenAPI can't express that structurally, so each such operation notes it in its description.

post.description: Exchange a username + password for a session cookie (`tdx_session`). **Public** (the only unauthenticated write route); rate-limited. On success sets the cookie and returns the user.

200.description: The authenticated user (public projection; never includes the password hash).

schema.description: The authenticated user (public projection; never includes the password hash).

fib_sizing.description: Whether task sizes use the fibonacci scale.

notes_root_name.description: Display name for the vault root ('' = hidden).

calendars_all_name.description: Display name for the all-calendars row ('' = hidden).

field.description: The offending input field, on validation errors.
The offending input field, on validation errors.

post.description: Revoke the current session and clear the cookie.

get.description: The authenticated user behind the current credential.

200.description: The authenticated user (public projection; never includes the password hash).

schema.description: The authenticated user (public projection; never includes the password hash).

fib_sizing.description: Whether task sizes use the fibonacci scale.

calendars_all_name.description: Display name for the all-calendars row ('' = hidden).

field.description: The offending input field, on validation errors.

put.description: Update profile, preferences, and/or credentials — every field is optional; only those present are changed. Changing the password requires `oldPassword` and revokes all *other* sessions. Field-specific validation errors return 400 with a `field`; username/email collisions return 409.

200.description: The authenticated user (public projection; never includes the password hash).

schema.description: The authenticated user (public projection; never includes the password hash).

fib_sizing.description: Whether task sizes use the fibonacci scale.

notes_root_name.description: Display name for the vault root ('' = hidden).

calendars_all_name.description: Display name for the all-calendars row ('' = hidden).

post.description: Create a new account. **Admin only.** Validation errors return 400 with a `field`; a username/email already in use returns 409.

post.description: Mint a PAT for an agent/integration. Requires **write** scope. `scopes` defaults to `["*"]` (full); pass e.g. `["read"]` for a read-only token. The raw `token` is returned **once**.

scopes.description: Array of scope strings; defaults to `["*"]` (full).

201.description: A freshly minted personal access token. Store `token` now; it is not stored server-side.

schema.description: A freshly minted personal access token. Store `token` now; it is not stored server-side.

token.description: The raw token — shown ONCE and never retrievable again.

field.description: The offending input field, on validation errors.

get.description: Token metadata for the account (never the raw token).

200.description: The account's tokens (metadata only — the raw token is never returned after creation).

schema.description: The account's tokens (metadata only — the raw token is never returned after creation).

delete.description: Revoke a token by id. Requires **write** scope. Returns 204 on success.

field.description: The offending input field, on validation errors.

get.description: The SPA startup read: every entity for the authenticated user (projects, calendars, folders, tasks, labels, saved queries) in one payload. Notes/events are fetched separately.

items.description: A to-do item. `recurrence` is a small phrase (e.g. `every mon,thu`); `labels` are label ids.

readableId.description: Short human id like `t_0042`, allocated on first save.

post.description: Run a tdx query across tasks/events/notes and get back matching entities. The query is a space-separated set of predicates, e.g. `status:open due:<7d label:urgent`. `type:task,event,note` selects which entity kinds to return (default `task`); `category:`/`project:`/`folder:`/`calendar:` filter by name; `limit`/`offset` paginate. Each result carries a `type` discriminator plus that entity's fields. An unknown `type:` token returns 400.

field.description: The offending input field, on validation errors.

post.description: Create a to-do item. Requires **write** scope. `id` may be a client-supplied UUID.

post.description: Mark done. If the task recurs, this spawns the next occurrence and a fresh unchecked subtask subtree. Requires **write** scope. Returns `{ task, created }`.

schema.description: The completed task plus any spawned occurrences: `{ task, created }`.

201.description: A calendar event. `startAt`/`endAt` are ISO timestamps (or `YYYY-MM-DD` when `allDay`); `recurrence` is a phrase like `weekly on tue`.

schema.description: A calendar event. `startAt`/`endAt` are ISO timestamps (or `YYYY-MM-DD` when `allDay`); `recurrence` is a phrase like `weekly on tue`.

get.description: Return events between `from` and `to` (ISO dates), with recurring events **expanded** into concrete occurrences (each carries the `date` it falls on).

post.description: Create a markdown note (writes the `.md` file, then indexes it). Requires **write** scope.

201.description: A markdown note. `body` is read live from the vault file (not stored in the DB); `path` is relative to the vault root and `folderId` is derived from its directory.

schema.description: A markdown note. `body` is read live from the vault file (not stored in the DB); `path` is relative to the vault root and `folderId` is derived from its directory.

example.title: Tomato care log
example.body:
# Tomatoes

Water deeply twice a week.

field.description: The offending input field, on validation errors.

get.description: All notes for the user (list projection — `body` is fetched via GET /api/notes/:id).

post.description: Reconcile the DB index with the on-disk vault after external edits (nvim/Obsidian). `mode=incremental` (default) only rescans changed files; `mode=full` rescans everything. Requires **write** scope. Returns counts of scanned/updated/tombstoned notes.

get.description: Full-text search over note titles + bodies. Returns hits with a highlighted snippet.
Fetch a single note including its `body` (read live from the vault file).

get.description: Current backup schedule + DB/vault health. **Admin only.**

200.description: Backup config + health (DB last_* and vault_last_* fields, plus dir probe).

schema.description: Backup config + health (DB last_* and vault_last_* fields, plus dir probe).

put.description: Enable/schedule backups (DB **and** vault share one switch). `dir` must be absolute; `time_of_day` is `HH:MM`; `retention` is 1–365. **Admin only.** Invalid values return 400.
